record.field: # Refresh match scores for active applicants applicants = model.search([('job_order_ids', '!=', False)]) for applicant in applicants: applicant._compute_ai_match()
# Auto-match for active jobs jobs = model.search([('state', 'in', ['active', 'posted']), ('ai_matching_enabled', '=', True)]) for job in jobs: job.action_find_matching_candidates()

# Archive jobs that have been filled for more than 90 days - simple cleanup old_jobs = model.search([('state', '=', 'filled'), ('active', '=', True)], limit=100) for job in old_jobs: job.write({'active': False})
Recruitment: Clean Up Old Job Postings
# Archive filled jobs old_jobs = model.search([('state', '=', 'filled'), ('active', '=', True)], limit=100) for job in old_jobs: job.write({'active': False})
# Sync recently updated applicants recent_applicants = model.search([('job_order_ids', '!=', False)], order='write_date desc', limit=50) # Sync logic here (e.g., API call to website) pass
# Sync recently updated applicants recent_applicants = model.search([('job_order_ids', '!=', False)], order='write_date desc', limit=50) # Sync logic here (e.g., API call to website) pass
